history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 02 column C, which is safe, and it moves me closer to the goal without stepping into lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column C facing right. The cell directly ahead is row 02 column D, which is safe, while the lava is below at row 03 column C. Moving forward keeps me progressing toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right. The cell ahead is a wall at row 02 column E, so I cannot move forward. The goal is below and to the left, and turning right will make me face down toward the open path. 
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing down. The cell directly ahead is row 03 column D, which is safe, and moving there brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D. 
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down. The cell directly ahead is row 04 column D, which is the goal and is safe to enter. 
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
